English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
New York State College of Human Ecology Research Office records
New York State College of Human Ecology. Research Office
23-7-2829
5.5 cubic feet. 5.5 cubic feet.
1946-2005. Publications, correspondence, reports, financial documents. Reports, correspondence, and other records pertaining to the College's research, grant distribution, academic studies, funding, and programs. Collection material in English 2713093
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Carolyn Smith
Date completed:
May 2003
EAD encoding:
Carolyn Smith, May 2003Sarah KeatingPeter Martinez
Date modified:
RMC Staff, January 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Reports, correspondence, and other records pertaining to the College's research, grant distribution, academic studies, funding, and programs.
RELATED MATERIALS
Includes collection #23-07-1063.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Committees Box 2
A. College Research CommitteeB. College Grants Committee
Series II. Grant Material Boxes 1, 2, 4, 5, 7, 9
Series III. Publications Boxes 3, 4, 5, 7
A. NY Food and Life Science QuarterlyB. Research NotesC. ThesesD. Particulars
Series IV. Manuals Box 4
Series V. Reports Boxes 2, 3, 7
A. AnnualB. Blackwell, 1966 C. Final Report to the PresidentD. ProjectE. Welfare Study, 1966-1970
Series VI. Subjects Files Box 2
Series VII. Research Files Boxes 1-5, 7, 8
Series VIII. Faculty Research Reports Box 6
Cite As:
New York State College of Human Ecology Research Office records, #23-7-2829. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Home economics -- Research. Human ecology -- Research.
